prompt: Починаю працювати над оптимізацією пошуку в vector-store.ts, запусти сесію

assertions.text: Calls start_session with a descriptive sessionId
Calls context_briefing with task mentioning vector-store.ts
Runs at least 2 tool calls in parallel (any combination)
Briefing mentions specific file paths relevant to vector-store.ts (e.g., vector-store.ts, qdrant, search)
Output contains at least 3 distinct sections (e.g., context, patterns, dependencies, profile)
Briefing references project-specific concepts (Qdrant, embeddings, collections) not generic boilerplate
